falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 41) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 typically indicates extreme volatility or a topping pattern, directly contradicting the bottom_2024_aug similarity and HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day low breaks below the previous 14-day low by 10% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakdown would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming a bearish trend rather than a potential bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
